summary: Good show highlighted by Spanish Jam and Black Peter, captured on a soundboard with modest sound issues.
review: The performance shines with a tasty Spanish Jam, a strong rendition of The Wheel and a breathtaking Black Peter, though the transition into The Wheel feels a bit clunky. The SBD source is an improvement over previous releases, but listeners note occasional distant guitar and other minor sound quirks. Overall the music outweighs the technical flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is praised (Spanish Jam, Black Peter, The Wheel) while recording has some sound issues; weighted average yields a solid mid‑high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Improved over older versions but still exhibits occasional muffled guitar, clunky transition into The Wheel and minor sound imperfections.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall flow is strong with a flavorful Spanish Jam, though the segue into The Wheel feels uneven; Black Peter provides an especially striking moment.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Occasionally distant in the mix but praised for bluesy tone on Spanish Jam.
